Home > @imqueue/rpc > verifyLogLevel

verifyLogLevel() function

Validates a log level value or returns the default

Signature:

export declare function verifyLogLevel(level: unknown): LogLevel;

Parameters

Parameter

Type

Description

level

unknown

the level to validate

Returns:

LogLevel

{LogLevel} - validated log level or INFO if invalid
